heading: Authorization of appropriations
label: 162 Authorization of appropriations
text: There is authorized to be appropriated such sums as may be necessary for expenditure by the Mediation Board in carrying out the provisions of this chapter.
notes: Amendments1934—Act , substituted “Mediation Board” for “Board of Mediation”.June 21, 1934
amendments: Amendments1934—Act , substituted “Mediation Board” for “Board of Mediation”.June 21, 1934
